title: Land of Aventuria
majorCorrection: The first extraction missed a large text table because it is encoded as Apple/control-code uppercase text, not plain or high-bit text. That table contains the seven advertised mini-adventures and many tutorial/game messages.

diskTextEncodingFindings.contents: Hospital hint, Secret Adventure intro, title strings.
Main Land of Aventuria mini-adventure message table, title table, terrain table, creature/name table.

confirmedMiniAdventureIndex.title: Map of Aventuria
confirmedMiniAdventureIndex.source: control-code title table at 0x15d2b and screenshots
confirmedTextSignals: MAP OF AVENTURIA
RETURN TO THE MAP OF AVENTURIA
confirmedMiniAdventureIndex.purpose: Hub that links the seven advertised mini-adventures and the hidden/secret tutorial content.

confirmedMiniAdventureIndex.title: How To Play
confirmedMiniAdventureIndex.source: control-code title table and message screens 0x02000-0x02800
confirmedTextSignals: WELCOME! MOVING ONTO A HELP SQUARE gives a message.
To skip to Agent OO111 use the door to the right.
Pick up the sword; fight the dragon; use the hospital; cast Summon Genie.

confirmedMiniAdventureIndex.title: Agent OO111
confirmedMiniAdventureIndex.source: control-code text screens 0x00a00-0x00e00 and 0x02800; short name hit at 0x16c4c
confirmedTextSignals: Your mission, should you decide to accept it...
Rescue the kidnapped daughter of our leading energy scientist.
Recover the microfilm showing his plans for pollution-free fuels.
Headquarters of the secret police of an evil nation.

confirmedMiniAdventureIndex.title: Sam Club, Private I
confirmedMiniAdventureIndex.source: control-code title table and message screens 0x00800-0x01200
confirmedTextSignals: You must solve the murder of my poor, sweet brother Jonathan.
This is a detective adventure where you get to solve a murder and catch the criminal.
Be sure to re-question the suspects any time you find new evidence.
You have unmasked the murderer and acquired her confession.

confirmedMiniAdventureIndex.title: Across the Delaware!
confirmedMiniAdventureIndex.source: control-code title table and message screens 0x02a00-0x03400; screenshots
confirmedTextSignals: On Christmas Eve of 1776, George Washington led soldiers across the Delaware River.
We forgot one historic item: a boat.
Bookshop owner asks for your autograph.
Hessian soldiers have bought every bottle of brandy in Trenton.
You have captured the sleeping commander of the Hessians and recaptured Trenton.
mechanicsTaught: obstacles that look like talking people

confirmedMiniAdventureIndex.title: Deep Dank Dungeon
confirmedMiniAdventureIndex.source: control-code title table and message screens 0x01800-0x02000 plus 0x04600
confirmedTextSignals: Welcome to the Deep Dank Dungeon and a quest to solve a great mystery.
Wistrik the Evil, a powerful wizard...
Hidden somewhere in this room is a magic scroll.
A labyrinth of rooms which all appear identical.
Drop a different item in each room to learn their magical patterns.
Before you is the time machine of Wistrik the Evil.

confirmedMiniAdventureIndex.title: Save the Galaxy!
confirmedMiniAdventureIndex.source: control-code title table and message screens 0x01a00-0x01c00 and 0x03600-0x04400
confirmedTextSignals: Takes place in three locations: a space ship, the surface of a distant planet, and dusty mines of a rocky asteroid.
F.S. Conquistador.
Planet Irata.
Crystite has been stolen.
Bomb in the port engine pod.
Amino acids trace analyzer identifies the traitor.
Heart of the Crystite Mines of asteroid Krazo.

confirmedMiniAdventureIndex.title: Alice in Wonderland
confirmedMiniAdventureIndex.source: control-code title table and message screens 0x04600-0x05200
confirmedTextSignals: Welcome to the ACS version of Alice in Wonderland.
Contains few puzzles, but lets you be Alice.
No fighting here.
White Rabbit, rabbit hole, Mouse, Bird, Caterpillar, Duchess, Cheshire Cat, March Hare, Mad Hatter, Dormouse, Queen, King, Knave, Pack of Cards.

confirmedMiniAdventureIndex.title: In the Nazi Castle
confirmedMiniAdventureIndex.source: control-code title table and message screens 0x00400-0x00600 plus completion at 0x05400
confirmedTextSignals: You are in a cell beneath a Nazi castle during World War II.
Find the secret plans and escape.
Use the red crosses to keep your life force high.
This mini-adventure shows how you can make one room into many rooms.
Completed this adventure and saved the Allied war effort.
mechanicsTaught: single room made into many rooms

confirmedMiniAdventureIndex.title: Your New Idea
confirmedTextSignals: -- YOUR NEW IDEA --
(NOT TO BE USED)
confirmedMiniAdventureIndex.purpose: A placeholder area/slot intended for user-authored expansion.

confirmedMiniAdventureIndex.title: Secret Adventure
confirmedTextSignals: Welcome to the Secret Adventure.
Hidden region left off the map in the manual.
Practice dealing with hostile and friendly creatures from the three base sets.
Examine how creatures were programmed.
